title: Plugin Registry Pointer
description: A minimal pointer to a Paperclip plugin published on npm. Plugin metadata (displayName, capabilities, etc.) is extracted from the package's built manifest at CI time and stored in registry/manifests/{slug}.json.

npmPackage.description: Exact npm package name (e.g. paperclip-foo or @scope/foo).

addedBy.description: GitHub handle of the submitter. Audit only; git history is canonical.

category.description: Hub-curated category for marketplace navigation. Distinct from the manifest's own categories array, which is the plugin author's classification.

sourceRepo.description: Optional. URL of the plugin's source repository (informational).
